title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: DOWNTOWN HEALTH CENTER REDMOND VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 236 NW Kingwood Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 617-4775 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (541) 617-4775 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: ccepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOWNTOWN HEALTH CENTER REDMOND
